title: lastrea pusilla
intro: Lastrea pusilla, also known as the dwarf lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Lastrea pusilla is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
